title: 大阪杯の後に・我等が示すは

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan and Yaeno Muteki treat the
exhilarated audience to an astonishing race,
during which both runners help each other to
overcome their limits.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Witnessing the race, Sakura Chiyono O vows to
surpass her own limits and catch up to Mejiro
Ardan and Yaeno Muteki.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki announces that, should Sakura
Chiyono O wish to enter the fray, her next race
will be the Takarazuka Kinen, and that she fully
intends to claim victory there.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Overjoyed to have Yaeno Muteki as her rival,
Mejiro Ardan sets her sights on the Takarazuka
Kinen as well, sharing the promise.
